page_content:
Corequisite: ENEE620; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. ENEE633 or ENEE739Q.

Formerly: ENEE739Q.

ENEE634 Learning and Statistical Signal Processing (3 Credits) Adaptive learning and statistical signal processing, including: numerical analysis; principal component analysis and support vector machines; adaptive signal processing (supervised learning); blind equalization

and identification (unsupervised learning); antenna array and MIMO signal processing; space-time and space-time-frequency coding; neural networks (nonlinear adaptive learning); advanced topics on machine learning, such as online and deep learning.
